to_continuation: grbsa_runtime.ExecutionAdapter (OBSERVES the receipt execute() writes; mints none)
risk_class: HIGHEST — authority-bearing, founded kernel, real durable-chain receipts
success_semantics: execution: domain match + gate admit + not failed + >=1 chain receipt written. Gate refusal is first-class non-success (valid receipt, not error).
equivalence_basis: Receipt Sufficiency Principle: same admit verdict + same failed flag + same receipts-written (lineage shape) (NOT receipt-hash identity)
strangler_status: legacy execute() REMAINS the ONLY execution path and source of truth; execution is NOT made routable even in the eligible sense without a separate later ratification (authority involved)
note: receipt-hash identity intentionally NOT asserted (chain hash binds ts)
